results.rendered_html:
grābha (von grabh)
1〉 Ergreifer (so v. a. graha 2,a,β) idamahaṃ ruśantaṃ grābhaṃ tanūdūṣimapohāmi  AV. 14,1,38 .
— 2〉 das Ergriffene: kṣumantaṃ citraṃ grābhaṃ saṃ gṛbhāya  ṚV. 8,70,1 .
— 3〉 Griff: indro grābhaṃ gṛbhṇīta sānasim  ṚV. 9,106,3 .
— Vgl. udagrābha, grāva˚, hasta˚.
